seo.title: Macarena Macarena Lyrics Kushi
seo.description: Full Macarena Macarena songs lyrics, Kushi Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Vairamuthu, Music: Deva, Singer(s): Devan Ekambaram, Sowmya Raoh.
seo.keywords: Vairamuthu, Kushi, Deva, Devan Ekambaram, Sowmya Raoh, Macarena Macarena full lyrics, Kushi songs lyrics, Macarena Macarena lyrics snippets, Macarena Macarena WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Macarena Macarena lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Macarena Macarena?

The song is a lively dance track that celebrates joy and fun, inviting listeners to let loose and enjoy the moment.

What is the context of this song in the movie Kushi?

In Kushi, this song is featured during a festive scene that highlights the characters' carefree and joyful moments together.

Who are the singers of Macarena Macarena?

The song is sung by Devan Ekambaram and Sowmya Raoh, both of whom bring a lively energy to the track.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Macarena Macarena was composed by Deva, known for his catchy and upbeat compositions in Tamil cinema.

When was the song released?

The song was released on May 19, 2000, as part of the movie Kushi.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Macarena Macarena from the movie Kushi is a lively and upbeat dance number that captures the essence of celebration and joy. It features playful lyrics that invite listeners to dance and enjoy life, reflecting the carefree spirit of the characters in the film. With its catchy tune and energetic vocals, the song evokes feelings of happiness and excitement, making it a perfect choice for parties and celebrations. Overall, it embodies the vibrant mood of the early 2000s Tamil music scene.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Macarena Macarena from Kushi is a vibrant dance number that will get you on your feet! Featuring the dynamic vocals of Devan Ekambaram and Sowmya Raoh, this song is a perfect blend of catchy beats and playful lyrics. With Deva's energetic composition, it's a celebration of joy and rhythm that resonates with every listener.
stanzaMeanings: Mac mac mac macareena, Mac mac mac macareena, Mac mac mac macareena, Mac-a-reena!(2)
macareena macareena, Is the moon that whistles?
macareena macareena, Is it the age that brings wings?
Macareena... Is that okay? Ma-gaa-gaa-gaa gaa-ree-naa...
What are our eyes? Seeing that, girls fall for it. They steal our hearts, they steal our hearts.
If girls are flowers, they need to be enjoyed. We shouldn't test our hearts, we shouldn't test our hearts.
macareena macareena, Is the moon that whistles?
Macareena... Is that okay? Ma-gaa-gaa-gaa gaa-ree-naa..
Mac mac mac macareena, Mac mac mac macareena, Mac mac mac macareena, Mac-a-reena!(2)
If I think, I will stop the world's sound for just one day. I will record the sound of flowers and the sound of the wind in a cassette. Oh oh oh...
If I think, I will trap the cloud's worm in my hair. I will show the first dew of the sky to my boyfriend.
If there are no hundreds, there is no wave, yeah yeah. If there are no reductions, there is no age, yeah yeah.
Mac mac mac macareena, Mac mac mac macareena, Mac mac mac macareena, Mac-a-reena!(2) Mac-a-reena......
One day we will fly in that sky. We will enjoy this earth from the light of the moon.
If thirst comes and the rain arrives, we will drink water from that cloud.
If the sun takes food, we will eat the stars, oh oh oh.
A little bit of sky, a little bit of earth, shall we live together?
If boredom strikes, shall we find a place?
Mac mac mac macareena, Mac mac mac macareena, Mac mac mac macareena, Mac-a-reena!(2)

macareena macareena, Is it the age that brings wings?
